sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكَاتِبُ الصُّوَرَ الْبَيَانِيَّةَ لِتَزْيِينِ النَّصِّ.
sentences.translation: Pisac koristi retoričke slike kako bi ukrasio tekst.
sentences.translationEn: The writer uses rhetorical images to decorate the text.

sentences.arabic: مَثَلاً، يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْعِلْمَ نُورٌ يُضِيءُ الطَّرِيقَ.
sentences.translation: Na primjer, kaže da je znanje svjetlost koja osvjetljava put.
sentences.translationEn: For example, he says that knowledge is a light that illuminates the path.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تَجْعَلُ الْمَعْنَى أَقْوَى فِي نَفْسِ السَّامِعِ.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore čine značenje jačim u duši slušaoca.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors make the meaning stronger in the listener's soul.

sentences.arabic: الْبَلَاغَةُ هِيَ جَوْهَرُ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْفَصِيحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rječitost je suština čistog arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Eloquence is the essence of fluent Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَتَعَلَّمُ كَيْفَ نَصِفُ الْأَشْيَاءَ بِطَرِيقَةٍ فَنِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učimo kako opisati stvari na umjetnički način.
sentences.translationEn: We learn how to describe things in an artistic way.
